title: 20 CM DEEP FAT FRYER SET PRIMA 3PC INDUCTION CHIP PAN STAINLESS STEEL POT+ LID & BASKET HOME KITCHEN PROFESSIONAL FOOD COOKING UK FREE P&P, Silver
features: Complete Frying Set: Includes a 20 cm deep fat fryer pot, a lid, and a frying basket, ideal for making crispy chips and other fried favorites.
Induction Compatible: Suitable for all stovetops, including induction, ensuring versatility in your kitchen.
Durable Stainless Steel: Made from high-quality stainless steel for excellent heat conduction, durability, and resistance to rust.
Secure Lid: Comes with a snug-fitting lid to minimize splatter and maintain optimal cooking temperatures.
Convenient Frying Basket: The included basket allows for easy lifting and draining of food, making frying safe and efficient.
description: Experience the joy of frying with the 20 CM Deep Fat Fryer Set PRIMA 3PC. This complete set includes a high-quality stainless steel frying pot, a snug-fitting lid, and a convenient frying basket, making it perfect for creating delicious chips, fried chicken, and more. Designed for versatility, this induction-compatible chip pan works seamlessly on all stovetops, ensuring you can enjoy professional-quality frying at home. The durable stainless steel construction guarantees excellent heat conduction and long-lasting performance, while the secure lid helps minimize splatter and retain heat for optimal cooking. The included frying basket makes lifting and draining your food a breeze, enhancing safety and efficiency during cooking. Whether you’re a home cook or a professional chef, this deep fat fryer set is an essential addition to your kitchen. Enjoy free UK delivery and elevate your frying game with the PRIMA Deep Fat Fryer Set today!
